data.body: New work: bug 1edf (ferric-jet-scorpion) - close gate referencing-commit precondition is parent-blind, forcing force-close of container epics (discovered from 2fd4 during that force-close). Fix: credit entire descendant subtree. Gates pass (AC/clarity/quality). Bug is exempt from plan-review claim gate; claimed directly. Setting up fresh worktree from origin/main.
